category_sources: Official GitHub README describes manifest-tool as a utility for OCIv1 and Docker v2.2 container registry manifest references.
source_facts.description says manifest-tool creates and queries container image manifest list/indexes.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the name manifest-tool.
source_facts.name gives the project name as manifest-tool.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for usage and background.
source_facts.homepage points to the official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes viewing and pushing multi-platform OCI/Docker container image references.
source_facts.description identifies container image manifest list/index operations.
